outline.title: Discipleship Training
outline.summary: Welcome to Discipleship Training. Equip believers for spiritual growth and maturity. This course provides frameworks and tools for effective disciple-making and spiritual formation.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Learn to equip believers for spiritual growth and maturity. This course provides frameworks and tools for effective disciple-making and spiritual formation in your ministry.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master spiritual formation and growth stages. Assess spiritual maturity and design discipleship models. Develop one-on-one and group discipleship. Create accountability structures and reproduce disciples.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering foundations of discipleship, spiritual formation, assessing maturity, discipleship models, one-on-one discipleship, group discipleship, accountability structures, obstacles, reproducing disciples, and integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and equip believers for spiritual growth and maturity. Develop the skills and frameworks to effectively disciple others and see transformation in your church community.
